title: Petco Health and Wellness Company, Inc. Class A Common Stock (WOOF) Earnings Report Dates & Earnings Forecasts
text: Petco (WOOF) Earnings Report Dates & Earnings Forecasts. Earnings Summary: The Nasdaq earnings page for Petco Health and Wellness Company provides comprehensive earnings information including historical results, upcoming dates, and analyst forecasts. Next Earnings Date: May 27, 2026 - The upcoming earnings date for Petco Health and Wellness Company, Inc. (WOOF). Recent Earnings Performance: Petco reported Q4 and full-year 2025 results on March 11, 2026, delivering profitability ahead of outlook. FY2025 net sales were $6.0B (-2.5%), adjusted EBITDA rose to $408.2M (+21.3%), and net income was $9.1M versus a prior-year loss. 2026 Outlook: Cash increased to $256.7M after $95M voluntary debt paydown, and the company provided FY2026 guidance of adjusted EBITDA $415M–$430M with net sales flat to +1.5%. Analyst Sentiment: According to 9 analysts, the average rating for WOOF stock is Hold. The 12-month stock price target is $4.06, which is an increase of 46.32% from the latest price. EPS Forecasts: On average, analysts forecast that WOOF's EPS will be $0.15 for 2026, with the lowest EPS forecast at $0.11, and the highest EPS forecast at $0.19.
